synopsis: Complaint of TE Walter Bjorck against Northern New England Presbytery; found administratively out of order by the SJC (31st GA, 2003).
notes: Confirmed from corpus: ga31_2003 pdf-p95 (printed 93) '2002-15 Complaint of TE Walter Bjorck vs. Northern New England Presbytery'. Roster spells the surname 'Bjork' (no c), which is why an earlier corpus search missed it.
